title: stellaria bungeana subsp. bungeana
intro: Stellaria bungeana subsp. bungeana, also known as Bunge's starwort, is a perennial plant species in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) that is native to China and parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. Stellaria bungeana subsp. bungeana is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
